title: Scamper
description: Clamber up hills, hurdle fences, leap onto ledges, and land carefully from heights.
body:
Scamper augments vanilla movement with flexible and fluid options while still keeping routine things comfortable and familiar. 
- While sprinting, you gain step and jump height, enabling you to rush up hills and jump over fences. (Without accidentally standing on your crafting table or falling over safety rails all the time the way one tends to with a constant step height modifier.)
- Crouching before a jump lets you get onto a 2-block ledge. 
- Holding sneak while landing can negate minor falling damage and mitigate major damage.

Inclusion is modpacks is highly encouraged. I want Minecraft to be more fun to play.

Part of the [✨Comfy Improvements](https://modrinth.com/collection/6YtxmFXB) series.
